creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Do you use ports or packages?

On one my host libgd was rebuilded a month ago and it depends on libimagequant.so.0.4, not on libimagequant.so.0.0.4:
# pkg info libgd
libgd-2.3.3_9,1
Name           : libgd
Version        : 2.3.3_9,1
Installed on   : Sun Jan 28 17:08:29 2024 MSK
Origin         : graphics/gd
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : graphics
Licenses       : MIT
Maintainer     : dinoex@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://libgd.github.io/
Comment        : Graphics library for fast creation of images
Options        :
        AVIF           : on
        FONTCONFIG     : on
        FREETYPE       : on
        HEIF           : on
        ICONV          : on
        JPEG           : on
        LIQ            : on
        PNG            : on
        RAQM           : on
        THREADS        : on
        TIFF           : on
        WEBP           : on
        XPM            : on
Shared Libs required:
        libwebp.so.7
        libtiff.so.5
        libraqm.so.0
        libpng16.so.16
        libjpeg.so.8
        libimagequant.so.0.4
        libheif.so.1
        libfreetype.so.6
        libfontconfig.so.1
        libavif.so.16
        libXpm.so.4
        libX11.so.6
Shared Libs provided:
        libgd.so.6
